stimulus: The corroboree frog is a species of amphibian native to Australia. Currently, the frog's habitat ______blank alpine wetlands in the Southern Tablelands of New South Wales.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. The convention being tested is verb tense and subject-verb agreement. The word "Currently" establishes a present time frame, so a present-tense verb is required. The subject "habitat" is singular, so the singular form "includes" is correct.

Choice B is incorrect because the simple past "included" doesn't match the present time frame indicated by "Currently." Choice C is incorrect because the future perfect doesn't match the present time frame. Choice D is incorrect because the past perfect doesn't match the present time frame.
